overall.description: A cinematic walk through a medieval castle courtyard in a video game (Hogwarts Legacy). The camera moves along cobblestone paths through manicured gardens toward a central fountain and gothic castle entrance, with students in robes walking about and misty mountains in the background. The lighting is soft morning sun with atmospheric haze.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved cobblestone path toward the distant castle, passing manicured hedges and flower planters

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on a stone bench facing away from the path

entered.detail: curved cobblestone path winding through the garden
large stone castle with multiple towers and spires in the distance
misty green mountains rising behind the castle
cluster of mature deciduous trees with full green foliage
vertical red and gold banners hanging from castle walls
formal garden hedges lining the pathway
large stone containers with flowering plants

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a curved cobblestone path winding through a formal garden toward a distant gothic castle. Morning light filters through atmospheric haze, illuminating the manicured hedges and stone planters. A student sits on a bench to the left while the camera moves steadily forward, with misty mountains visible in the background.

events.description: camera turns slightly right toward the central fountain area, deviating from the curved path

agents.ego_description: moving through the central courtyard toward the fountain, navigating around other students

notable_agents.action: two students in colored robes (one red, one blue) walking ahead toward the fountain

entered.detail: multi-tiered stone fountain with water basin in the courtyard center
stone seating arranged along the garden paths

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the central courtyard where a large stone fountain becomes visible ahead. The crowd density increases with students walking in various directions. Two students in distinctive red and blue robes walk ahead toward the fountain. The castle looms closer, and the path begins to straighten as the camera approaches the plaza.

events.description: passing by two students in yellow and dark robes walking across the path
transitioning from curved cobblestone to straight stone pathway leading directly to castle gate

agents.ego_description: approaching the central fountain and castle entrance, moving past students conversing near the hedges

notable_agents.action: student in yellow robes walking past the camera toward the right

entered.detail: large arched stone entrance to the castle with iron portcullis
reflective water surface in the fountain basin

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the central fountain on a straight stone pathway, with the castle's arched gate now clearly visible ahead. Students walk past in opposing directions, including one in yellow robes. The fountain dominates the center of the frame as the camera moves into the plaza area, with the gothic architecture of the castle entrance becoming more detailed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a secluded formal garden into the bustling heart of a gothic castle courtyard. It begins on a curved cobblestone path winding past manicured hedges and a seated student, with morning light filtering through an atmospheric haze against a backdrop of misty mountains. As the camera advances, the path straightens and the environment opens into a central plaza where the crowd density increases, following students in red and blue robes toward a large stone fountain. The scene then expands to reveal the detailed gothic architecture of the castle's arched gate, with students in various colored robes crossing the path in opposing directions. Finally, the camera glides into the plaza area as the fountain dominates the frame and the imposing castle entrance looms directly ahead.
